settings.heading: How long does shipping take?
settings.row_content: Dispatch times vary by batch. You’ll see an estimate at checkout.

settings.heading: Can I exchange sizes?
settings.row_content: If you need help choosing a size, message us before ordering. Exchange policy depends on the drop; see Shipping & Returns.

settings.heading: How do I care for the print?
settings.row_content:
• Wash inside-out
  • Cold wash
  • Do not iron directly on print
  • Hang dry
